description: A pulmonologist and a neurologist are reviewing a CT Cranium DICOM scan in InVesalius 3. Produce two distinct volume rendering visualizations. Create a visualization using an 'Airways' or transparency-based preset (e.g., 'Airways', 'Airways II') and export the screenshot to /home/ga/Documents/airway_rendering.png. Create a second visualization using a 'Soft Tissue' or 'Brain' preset (e.g., 'Soft Tissue', 'Brain', 'Soft + Skin') and export the screenshot to /home/ga/Documents/softtissue_rendering.png. Both files must be valid, distinct PNG images.
